Rules:
1. Ensure that before implementation, stop the game from play mode. And only then shall implementation happens
2. Important scripts (such as mechanics, and special features) should be put on ServerScriptStorage.
3. All that are in the workspace must not be touch. Especially the LuckyPartsTemp. They're the workstation. You must copy the mentioned object in the ReplicatedStorage first, name them folder that will contain them as Temporary Shit or something.
